pi_items.source: Verified against task instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly check this exact file path.

Compared against the explicitly required values in verifier.py and corroborated with standard DIN EN 1092-1 DN50 PN16 flange dimensions (noting 61.0 is used for tight fit or gasket instead of standard 61.5).
Inspected verifier.py logic where 'tolerance = 0.5' is hardcoded when checking parametric dimensions.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed the task asks the agent to create a 3D model of a DN50 PN16 flange from a blank canvas (synthetic data), saving it to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/dn50_flange.slvs'. The expected dimensions (165.0mm outer, 125.0mm pitch, 61.0mm inner, 18.0mm hole diameter and thickness) strictly match the verification criteria in verifier.py and generally align with standard DIN EN 1092-1 flange specifications. A dimensional tolerance of 0.5 is also confirmed in the verifier script.
